title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 436.336 - Applicability
text:
436.336.  Applicability. — Sections 436.300 to 436.336 shall apply to contracts and agreements entered into after August 28, 2002.  Sections 436.300 to 436.336 shall apply to all private construction projects, except single-family residential construction and other residential construction consisting of four or fewer units.
(L. 2002 H.B. 1403)
